data.body: Stack (515->517->518->521) is ON-TIP 9be397b3 (main stable). CI: 515/517/521 running, 518 FAILED on pre-existing 'could not parse HEAD' temp-store git-race flake (test_list_filters, edf7 family — unrelated to grounding change) -> posted recheck comment on 518. Once all 4 green, submit top 521 -> merges all 4 FF. 6 bugs+skill done. After: close 7a41 d220 406f 5147 + 3b4e tests.
